question: Nut allergy, paleo, high protein, no pickles. A nut‑free paleo high protein meal without pickles.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Nut allergy, paleo, high protein, no pickles. A nut‑free paleo high protein meal without pickles.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Sorry, I didn't catch that clearly. Could you repeat your order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I need a nut-free paleo high-protein meal without pickles.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Sorry, we don't have any paleo meals that are nut-free and high in protein. But the McSpicy Chicken is nut-free and has 21.5g of protein (the highest protein option we have). It doesn't contain pickles, but it does include gluten, dairy, and soya (so it wouldn't meet paleo criteria). Would you like to try it?

final_cashier_response: Sorry, we don't have any paleo meals that are nut-free and high in protein. But the McSpicy Chicken is nut-free and has 21.5g of protein (the highest protein option we have). It doesn't contain pickles, but it does include gluten, dairy, and soya (so it wouldn't meet paleo criteria). Would you like to try it?
